esv_text: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life.
kjv_text: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.
niv_text: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.
nlt_text: For this is how God loved the world: He gave his one and only Son, so that everyone who believes in him will not perish but have eternal life.

esv_text: And we know that for those who love God all things work together for good, for those who are called according to his purpose.
kjv_text: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose.
niv_text: And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him, who have been called according to his purpose.
nlt_text: And we know that God causes everything to work together for the good of those who love God and are called according to his purpose for them.

esv_text: I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
kjv_text: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.
niv_text: I can do all this through him who gives me strength.
nlt_text: For I can do everything through Christ, who gives me strength.

esv_text: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
kjv_text: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
niv_text: The LORD is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
nlt_text: The LORD is my shepherd; I have all that I need.

esv_text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.
kjv_text: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the LORD, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you an expected end.
niv_text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
nlt_text: For I know the plans I have for you, says the LORD. They are plans for good and not for disaster, to give you a future and a hope.
